notes: Extracted from interaction-preview-final-v2.html and treated as the fixed shell for final interaction demo HTML deliverables.
The left preview / right document split view, header rows, tabs, state rail, phone frame, and doc section scaffolding are template-first and should not be re-invented per task.
When a frame or state maps to home, list, fill, or occupy semantics, the phone body must be rendered through the corresponding page template instead of rebuilding ad hoc phone blocks.
Future final demos should vary primarily through frame data, template data, fallback blocks for non-core pages, and doc section content.
